1770760.name: Codename: TIARAS
1770760.description:
Play as a female cyborg, Mia, in an all new, cyberpunk, 2D platformer, delivering data cubes under the pressure of your clients. Filled with challenging obstacles and hazards, this fast-paced world keeps players on the move with the clock ticking. Traverse through the city high rises and beautifully warped environments - will you make it on time?



  • CHALLENGING OBSTACLES
A unique set of parkour platforms, players will find that this game is more than the average platformer. Throughout the phases, a mixture of the core mechanics is required to successfully and efficiently deliver the data cubes.

  • DAZZLING ENVIRONMENT
Codename: TIARAS showcases amazing graphics with the building structures, dynamic lighting, dynamic audio and glistening visual effects.



This game was developed as a student project at DigiPen Institute of Technology and was created for educational purposes only. Please check out our publisher page for more information.
